subject: Re: Ohio
body:
ok


----- Original Message ----
From: "danars07@aol.com" <danars07@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, January 11, 2007 9:54:09 AM
Subject: Ohio


 Jeffrey,
    Thanks for the offer to go home...I would really like to see my family.  I found a ticket leaving on Saturday and returning Monday for $250...is this ok?
    Thanks again for everything.
 
Dana B
